description: Browser extension that groups a GitHub PR diff into reviewable units and suggests a reading order, rendered on the Files-changed page.

tasks.description: Scaffold the WXT + Svelte + TypeScript + Tailwind extension with Bun.
steps: Initialize a WXT project configured for Svelte and TypeScript strict mode
Add Tailwind CSS wired for Shadow-DOM-scoped styles
Configure the content-script match pattern for https://github.com/*/*/pull/*/files
Add a placeholder background service worker and options page entrypoints
Verify `make dev` builds the unpacked extension with no type or build errors
Verify the extension loads in Chrome and the background worker starts

tasks.description: Typed settings storage and an Options page for keys and model choice.
steps: Define a typed Settings shape: githubToken, anthropicApiKey, model, effort
Implement lib/storage.ts with get/set helpers over browser.storage.local
Build the Options Svelte page to edit and persist all settings
Default model to claude-opus-4-8 and effort to medium; offer sonnet/haiku options
Never log secrets; mask key inputs in the UI
Unit-test the storage accessors with a mocked storage backend

tasks.description: Shared discriminated-union message contract between content script and worker.
steps: Define ANALYZE request and RESULT/ERROR response message types in lib/messaging.ts
Implement a typed sendMessage wrapper and a worker-side handler registrar
Round-trip a no-op ANALYZE -> RESULT message end to end
Unit-test message serialization/typing

tasks.description: GitHub REST client to fetch diff, files, commits, and PR metadata.
steps: Fetch the unified diff via Accept: application/vnd.github.v3.diff
Fetch files (paginated, per_page=100), commits, and PR metadata/body
Extract linked/closing issues from the PR body (Closes/Fixes #N)
Authenticate with the user PAT via Authorization: Bearer
Surface rate-limit and auth errors as typed errors
Unit-test against recorded fixture responses in tests/fixtures/

tasks.description: Pure unified-diff parser producing structured files and hunks.
steps: Parse the unified diff into FileDiff[] with path, status, and Hunk[]
Capture per-hunk added/removed line counts and line ranges for jump links
Handle renames, binary files, and new/deleted files
Keep the module pure (no DOM/browser imports) for unit testing
Unit-test with multiple fixture diffs including renames and binaries

tasks.description: Mechanical-change classifier that runs before the LLM.
steps: Flag lockfiles, generated/vendored paths, and minified files
Flag pure renames (status renamed, no content change)
Flag formatting-only hunks (identical after whitespace normalization)
Return interesting vs mechanical partitions for the pipeline
Keep pure; unit-test each rule with fixtures

tasks.description: JSON schema, prompt, and result types for the grouping/reading-order output.
steps: Define GROUPING_SCHEMA (groups[], readingOrder[], per-group label and fileRefs, intent summary)
Ensure every object sets additionalProperties:false; validate non-schema constraints client-side
Write the system prompt: cluster by concern, label, order, with one-line rationale
Export TypeScript types matching the schema
Unit-test that a sample model JSON validates against the types

tasks.description: Claude client wrapper that returns structured grouping for interesting hunks.
steps: Initialize @anthropic-ai/sdk with dangerouslyAllowBrowser and the stored key
Call the selected model with thinking adaptive and output_config.format = json_schema
Place stable system+schema first and the volatile diff last (cache-friendly)
JSON.parse the result and validate against the grouping types
Handle rate-limit/refusal/oversize errors as typed errors
Unit-test parsing/validation with a recorded API response fixture

tasks.description: Background orchestration: fetch -> parse -> pre-pass -> LLM -> cache.
steps: Wire GitHub client, diff parser, heuristics, and Anthropic client together
Send only interesting hunks to the LLM; merge mechanical groups back in
Cache the grouping by PR head SHA in storage; reuse on repeat opens
Return a single typed grouping result over the messaging channel
Integration-test the pipeline with fixtures (LLM call mocked)

tasks.description: Detect the PR Files page (incl. soft navigation) and mount the panel host.
steps: Parse owner/repo/number from the URL on the Files-changed page
Handle Turbo/PJAX soft navigation (turbo:load + MutationObserver fallback)
Mount a Shadow-DOM panel host via WXT createShadowRootUi; avoid duplicate mounts
Trigger an ANALYZE request and show a loading state
Manually verify navigation between PRs re-runs detection correctly

tasks.description: Svelte panel rendering intent, groups, reading order, and jump links.
steps: Render the intent summary and change-type label
Render groups as collapsible sections with labels and per-group rationale
Render the reading order as an ordered, clickable list that scrolls to files/hunks
Fold mechanical groups by default; allow expand
Style with Tailwind scoped inside the Shadow DOM
Playwright-test rendering against a fixture Files page

tasks.description: User-facing handling for missing keys, auth, rate limits, and failures.
steps: Detect missing/invalid keys and link to the Options page
Map GitHub and Anthropic errors to clear panel messages with a retry action
Add a manual refresh that bypasses the cache
Playwright-test the error and empty states
